caption: In the video, a person is holding up a small white card with some text on it, which appears to be a business card or an informational card. The card is being shown to two men who are standing nearby. One of the men, wearing a gray polo shirt with a name tag that reads "Mr. Steve Lerner" and "Alpha Szensor," seems to be engaged in conversation, possibly explaining something related to the card. The other man, dressed in a light blue shirt, is smiling and appears to be listening attentively. The setting seems to be a professional environment, possibly a conference or exhibition, as indicated by the background signage and the formal attire of the individuals. The focus remains on the card and the interaction between the three people throughout the sequence.
